description: Perform a Vector Error Correction Model (VECM) analysis on US GDP and Inflation data using the 'usa.gdt' dataset. Create a new variable named 'l_gdp' as the natural logarithm of 'gdp'. Estimate a VECM for 'l_gdp' and 'inf' using a lag order of 4 and a cointegration rank of 1. Save the complete estimation output to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/vecm_results.txt.

metadata.data_source: Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis (FRED) via Principles of Econometrics 5th Ed.
